# Tribute Hair & Body Care — LLM Reference File
# Site: https://tributehairandbody.com
# Updated: March 2026
# Purpose: AI/LLM crawling, product discovery, and accurate brand representation

## Brand Overview
Tribute Hair & Body Care is a Texas-based clean beauty brand under TXWNBS (Texas Wholesale Natural Beauty Supplies).
We formulate and distribute sulfate-free, paraben-free, silicone-free hair care products for natural, curly, kinky, coily, coarse, and dry hair types.
All products are made in small batches with Whole Foods-approved preservative systems and premium botanical actives.

## Brand Values
- Sulfate-free formulations
- Paraben-free
- Silicone-free
- Vegan and cruelty-free
- Color-safe
- Whole Foods-approved preservative system (Benzyl Alcohol & Dehydroacetic Acid)
- Formulated for textured, natural, and melanin-rich hair

## Contact & Location
Business Name: Tribute Hair & Body Care / TXWNBS
Mailing Address: PMB 410, 1671 E Broad St. Ste 103, Mansfield TX 76063
Customer Email: hello@tributehairandbody.com
B2B/Wholesale Email: TexasWNBS@gmail.com
Website: https://tributehairandbody.com
Communications: Email and chat only — no phone

---

## Products — Shampoos

### Silk Rain Moisturizing Shampoo
URL: /products/silk-rain-moisturizing-shampoo
Price: $14.99
Size: 8 fl oz / 236 mL
Hair Types: Dry, Coarse, Natural, Curly, Kinky, Wavy
Claims: Sulfate-Free, Paraben-Free, Silicone-Free, Vegan, Color Safe
Key Ingredients: Chamomile & White Tea Infused Water, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Bambusa Vulgaris (Bamboo) Leaf/Stem Extract, Hydrolyzed Oat Protein, Panthenol, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Anthemis Nobilis Flower Extract, Selenicereus Grandiflorus Flower Extract, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Fragrance
Full INCI: Water (Aqua) [Chamomile (Anthemis Nobilis) and White Tea (Camellia Sinensis) Infused], Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Cocamide MIPA, Glycerin, Xanthan Gum, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Bambusa Vulgaris Leaf/Stem Extract, Hydrolyzed Oat Protein, Panthenol, Anthemis Nobilis Flower Extract, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Selenicereus Grandiflorus Flower Extract, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Water, Fragrance (Parfum)
Description: Moisturizing shampoo with chamomile and white tea infused base. Gentle cleansing without stripping. Bamboo extract strengthens, oat protein smooths, panthenol seals moisture.

### Clean Slate Clarifying Castile Shampoo
URL: /products/clean-slate-clarifying-castile-shampoo
Price: $13.99
Size: 8 fl oz / 236 mL
Hair Types: All Hair Types, Scalp-Prone, Buildup-Prone, Locs
Claims: Sulfate-Free, Paraben-Free, Silicone-Free, Vegan, Color Safe
Key Ingredients: Castile Soap (Potassium Cocoate), Peppermint Essential Oil (Mentha Piperita), Tea Tree Oil (Melaleuca Alternifolia), Rosemary Essential Oil (Rosmarinus Officinalis), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Glycerin, Panthenol, Hydrolyzed Oat Protein, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid
Full INCI: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Water (Aqua), Potassium Cocoate (Castile Soap), Glycerin, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Panthenol, Hydrolyzed Oat Protein, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Water
Description: Castile soap-based clarifying shampoo with peppermint, tea tree, and rosemary essential oils. Removes product buildup, mineral deposits, and scalp debris. Monthly use recommended. Follow with ACV rinse and Velvet Dew Conditioner.

---

## Products — Conditioners

### Velvet Dew Moisturizing Conditioner
URL: /products/velvet-dew-moisturizing-conditioner
Price: $14.99
Size: 8 fl oz / 236 mL
Hair Types: Dry, Coarse, Natural, Curly, Kinky, Wavy, 4a-4c
Claims: Sulfate-Free, Paraben-Free, Silicone-Free, Vegan, Color Safe, 72-Hour Moisture
Key Ingredients: Marshmallow Root Extract (Althaea Officinalis), Avocado Oil (Persea Gratissima), Saccharide Isomerate (72-Hour Moisture Complex), Hydrolyzed Oat Protein, Alteromonas Ferment Extract, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Fragrance
Full INCI: Water (Aqua), Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Behentrimonium Methosulfate (and) Cetearyl Alcohol, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Kernel Oil, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Alteromonas Ferment Extract, Hydrolyzed Oat Protein, Althaea Officinalis (Marshmallow) Root Extract, Saccharide Isomerate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Water, Fragrance (Parfum)
Description: Moisturizing conditioner with marshmallow root for slip, avocado oil for penetrating moisture, and Saccharide Isomerate for 72-hour lasting hydration. Silicone-free. Excellent for detangling and deep conditioning.

2. The Full Reset (Clean Slate + Silk Rain + Velvet Dew) — $38.99 (save $4.98)
3. The Scalp Reset (Clean Slate + Velvet Dew) — $25.99 (save $2.99)

## Brand Assets & Identity
Primary Colors: Burgundy #6B1E2E, Gold #C9A84C, Cream #FAF6F0, Deep Burgundy #4A0E1A
Fonts: Cormorant Garamond (display), DM Sans (body)
Logo: Crown Coil — stacked ovals with diamond tiara crown; trademark TRIBUTE™
